model: v20clean 3-seed club ensemble + v21goal blend w=0.65 (lineup-aware)
confirmed_lineup_note: Both XIs 11/11 from ESPN summary (event 401878134). 13/22 player embeddings matched, LOPSIDED: Paksi (home) only 3/11 matched, Panathinaikos (away) 10/11 matched.

bets.staking_method: Half-Kelly/8%-cap formula gave EUR13 (+10.4pp edge, +50.9% EV); HALVED to EUR7 by explicit user decision -- Paksi's own confirmed XI matched only 3/11 embeddings (vs Panathinaikos 10/11), same lopsided-thin-data shape as Vojvodina/Qarabag/Paide.
Half-Kelly/8%-cap formula gave EUR9 (+6.9pp edge, +30.9% EV); HALVED to EUR5, same thin-home-data discount as the home-win leg.

excluded_legs_note: Away win (Panathinaikos, -24.8pp edge, -38.2% EV) excluded as a clear no-bet.
data_note: 13/22 total embeddings, lopsided 3/11 (Paksi) vs 10/11 (Panathinaikos) -- both home-side legs downsized to half formula size on data-trust grounds, same treatment as bet #21 (Vojvodina).
provenance_note: Prediction generated pre-kickoff from confirmed XIs; bet placed at Unibet around the 18:00Z kickoff; this commit logged minutes after kickoff, before any result information. Not a pre-kickoff-proof pick per the strict standard.
